member.summary: error codes defined in this assembly

member.name: F:nxm.data.nbo.nxm_nbo_error.ERROR_NBUF_FIELD_DOESNT_EXISTS
member.summary: there is no field {0} in nbuf {1}/{2} object

member.summary: acquire exclusive lock to this document

member.name: F:nxm.data.nbo.document.client_nbo_document_.m_oExclusiveLock
member.summary: exclusive, reentrant lock for this document

member.name: T:nxm.data.nbo.document.nbo_document_
member.summary: NBO (NXM business object) document base class

member.summary: ensures that required segments in given NBO are loaded and current (not-outdated)

member.summary: operation call context (used when caller don't provide it's own

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.document.nbo_document_.working_set
member.summary: working set with all NBOs loaded in current document

member.name: T:nxm.data.nbo.document.inbo_document_
member.summary: nxm business object document interface exposed to application code

member.name: T:nxm.data.nbo.document.inbo_document_host
member.summary: interface which must be implemented by document host

member.name: T:nxm.data.nbo.document.iclient_nbo_document_host
member.summary: interface which must be implemented by client-document host

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.document.iclient_nbo_document_host.msop_goc
member.summary: general-purpose governed-object-container to be used by document

member.name: T:nxm.data.nbo.document.iserver_nbo_document_host
member.summary: interface which must be implemented by server-document host

member.name: T:nxm.data.nbo.document.nbo_working_set
member.summary: NBO working set - holds object for single nbo-document

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.document.nbo_working_set.try_get_from_cache(nxm.system.core.data.types.monikers.ilocal_moniker)
member.summary: try return nbo from cache for given moniker
member.returns: The nbo object if found in cache, otherwise null

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.document.nbo_working_set.set_to_cache(nxm.system.core.data.types.monikers.ilocal_moniker,nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_)
member.summary: store object in cache note: NBO_ may be not fully initialized at this stage, so we have to pass moniker for key composition
member.param: The nbo object to store in cache

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.document.nbo_working_set.remove(nxm.system.core.data.types.monikers.ilocal_moniker)
member.param: The moniker of the nbo to remove from cache

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.document.nbo_working_set._compose_cache_key(nxm.system.core.data.types.monikers.ilocal_moniker)
member.summary: compose nbo-cache key for given moniker

member.summary: server side NBO (NXM business object) document base class

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.transactions.nbot_cmd_.role
member.summary: optional object 'role' - used on server side to semantically identify object in document

member.name: T:nxm.data.nbo.nbo_list_query_params__
member.summary: COPILOT: Represents the base class for all business-object list query parameters.

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.nbo_list_query_params__.#ctor
member.summary: COPILOT: Initializes a new instance of the nbo_list_query_params__ class.

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.nbo_list_query_params__.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: COPILOT: Initializes a new instance of the nbo_list_query_params__ class with the specified result type and request type.

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.nbo_list_query_params__.clone
member.summary: COPILOT: Creates a new instance of nbo_list_query_params__ and copies the properties to it.

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.nbo_list_query_params__.apply_tuning(nxm.data.query.list.list_query_params)
member.summary: COPILOT: Applies tuning to the list query parameters.

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.nbo_list_query_params__.copy_to(nxm.data.query.list.list_query_params)
member.summary: COPILOT: Copies the properties of the list query parameters to the target.

member.name: T:nxm.data.nbo.objects.eNBOLiveCycleEvent
member.summary: native business object live cycle events

member.name: F:nxm.data.nbo.objects.eNBOLiveCycleEvent.CREATED
member.summary: CREATED - created new, not saved yet

member.name: F:nxm.data.nbo.objects.eNBOLiveCycleEvent.LOADED
member.summary: LOADED/RESTORED - first time loaded existing object from database or deserialized from network underlying buffers were uninitialized before event there is no need for cleaning existing extra structures (operation: create-extra-structures-for-loaded-segment)

member.name: F:nxm.data.nbo.objects.eNBOLiveCycleEvent.EXPANDED
member.summary: EXPANDED - reloaded with more data but same version. underlying buffers can contain some data, but change is related to new segments (operation: create-extra-structures-for-newly-loaded-segment)

member.name: F:nxm.data.nbo.objects.eNBOLiveCycleEvent.RELOADED
member.summary: RELOADED - reloaded with newer version of data. may be also expanded (operation: update extra structures for existing-segments depending on new data arrived, create-extra-structures-for-expanded-segment)

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_.local_version
member.summary: returns local change version ("uncommited changes count")

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_.is_new
member.summary: is newly created object (not saved in persistent storage yet)

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_.__may_be_outdated
member.summary: [MIGRATION NOTE: public during migration only. then should be internal]

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_.__clear_may_be_outdated
member.summary: [MIGRATION NOTE: public during migration only. then should be internal]

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_.__mark_may_be_outdated
member.summary: mark, that content may be outdated and need to be reloaded to ensure current version [MIGRATION NOTE: public during migration only. then should be internal]

member.name: F:nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_.m_iLocalVersion
member.summary: local change version (used by bo-clients i.e. model-document)

member.name: T:nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_`1
member.summary: base class for all business-objects, having buffers

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_`1._is_segment_loaded(System.UInt32)
member.summary: returns information if given data segment is loaded

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_`1._ensure_segment_loaded(System.UInt32)
member.summary: loads given segments if not already loaded

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_`1._ensure_not_outdated
member.summary: ensure that object is not outdated. creates async call only when necessary

member.name: T:nxm.data.nbo.objects.inbo_
member.summary: NXM business object base interface exposed to application code

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.objects.inbo_.is_new
member.summary: is newly created object (not saved in persistent storage yet)

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.objects.inbo_.local_version
member.summary: returns local change version ("uncommited changes count")

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.nbuf.nbuf_._nbuf_init``1(nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_{``0},nxm.data.core.access.idata_reader)
member.summary:
just load buffer content from data reader. then will be post-process method called for further initialization (extra structures, etc.)
note: naming convention is _{class}_load_from_data_reader

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.nbuf.nbuf_._nbuf_post_load``1(nxm.data.nbo.objects.nbo_{``0},nxm.data.nbo.objects.eNBOLiveCycleEvent,System.UInt32)
member.summary: post process buffer after being loaded: either just created, refreshed, loaded more segments or restored note: naming convention is _{class}_post_process_loaded

member.name: F:nxm.data.nbo.nbuf.nbuf_.NBUF_SERIAL_PROP_ID
member.summary: propertiary, bob-only-defined property for serialization of id

member.name: F:nxm.data.nbo.nbuf.nbuf_.NBUF_SERIAL_PROP_VERSION
member.summary: propertiary, bob-only-defined property for serialization of version

member.name: F:nxm.data.nbo.nbuf.nbuf_.NBUF_SERIAL_PROP_EXTRAS
member.summary: propertiary, bob-only-defined property for serialization of xtras

member.summary: native persistent storage (NPS) API command (transfer object)

member.summary: [MIGRATION NOTE: list-query parameters for nbo-ps level, can contain more information than ps_list_query_params analyse if migrating it to ps_list_query_params will provide to lose of functionality]

member.summary: convert variant value to XML stored as string (serialize)

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.nps.nps_rt_.variant_from_edo(System.String)
member.summary: convert XML stored as string into variant value (deserialize)

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.nps.nps_rt_.create_single_stage_lqi``1(nxm.data.query.list.list_query_params,nxm.data.entities.ientity_info_catalogue{nxm.data.entities.entity_info_},nxm.data.query.list.execution.fpQueryableProvider{``0},``0)
member.summary: prepare list-query-instance for qiven params and context single stage (plain) processing

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.nps.transactions.nps_transaction_params_.commit
member.summary: should this transaction perform commit? (usually yes, but in some cases transactions are split into parts)

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.nps.transactions.nps_transaction_result_.dirty_nbos
member.summary: set of NBOs changed by this transaction (used to invalidate at client)

member.name: P:nxm.data.nbo.nps.transactions.nps_transaction_result_.all_dirty
member.summary: marker, that all NBOs should be treated as invalid

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.sql.ndb_sql_operations.create_database_with_stock_objects(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: script which creates new database and initializes it with stock objects

member.summary: reconfigures user permissions to access database

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.sql.ndb_sql_operations.call_nxm_make_grants(System.String)
member.summary: create script for granting particular rights

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.sql.ndb_sql_operations.create_sql_user_login(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: script for creating sql user login

member.name: M:nxm.data.nbo.sql.ndb_sql_operations.grant_sql_user_access(System.String)
member.summary: create script for user access to current db

member.name: T:nxm.nbo.core.global.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:nxm.nbo.core.global.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:nxm.nbo.core.global.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:nxm.nbo.core.global.Resources.nxm_core_v1_create_db_sql
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to ------------ -- NXM System: create database -- version: 2018-03-13 ------------
if (1={2}) begin create database {0} on ( NAME = 'data', FILENAME = N'{1}{0}.mdf' ) log on ( NAME = 'log', FILENAME = N'{1}{0}_log.ldf' ) collate SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AI end else begin create database {0} collate SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AI end go alter database {0} set allow_snapshot_isolation on go alter database {0} set read_committed_snap [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:nxm.nbo.core.global.Resources.nxm_core_v1_grants_sql
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to ------------ -- NXM System: make grants -- version: 2018-03-13 ------------
if exists (select * from sysobjects where name = '_nxm_make_grants') drop procedure _nxm_make_grants go
create procedure _nxm_make_grants(@username nchar(50)) /*with encryption*/ as declare cur cursor for select o.name as name, o.type as type from sysobjects o where ObjectProperty(o.id, 'IsMSShipped') = 0 open cur
declare @name nchar(100) declare @type nchar(2) fetch next from cur into @name, @type wh [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:nxm.nbo.core.global.Resources.nxm_core_v1_ps_support_sql
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- NXM System: core attribute support and other utils -- version: 2022-10-18 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- convert datetime to ticks -- credits: (https://stackoverflow.com/questions/7386634/convert-sql-server-datetime-object-to-bigint-net-ticks) --
create function dbo._nxm_datetime_2_ticks(@dtDate datetime2) returns bigint [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:nxm.nbo.core.global.Resources.nxm_core_v1_restore_db_sql
member.summary:
Looks up a localized string similar to ------------ -- NXM System: restore database -- version: 2018-03-13 ------------
if exists(select * from sys.sysdatabases where name = '{0}') begin alter database {0} set auto_update_statistics_async off alter database {0} set single_user with rollback after 60 end go
restore database {0} from disk = N'{1}' with move '{3}' to N'{2}{0}.mdf', move '{4}' to N'{2}{0}.ldf', replace
go alter database {0} set multi_user go alter database {0} set auto_update_statistics_async on go .

member.name: M:nxm.nbo.core.nbo.components.nbo_document_crud_component.create_nbo``1(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,nxm.data.core.access.idata_reader)
member.summary: COPILOT: Creates a new NBO (NXM business object) of the specified type.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the created NBO.

member.name: M:nxm.nbo.core.nbo.components.nbo_document_crud_component.get_nbo``1(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.system.core.data.types.monikers.ilocal_moniker,System.UInt32)
member.summary: method tries to get NBO locally and when necessary, performs full load

member.name: M:nxm.nbo.core.nbo.components.nbo_document_crud_component.get_nbo_for_restore``1(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.data.nbo.nbuf.nbuf_)
member.summary: COPILOT: Retrieves an NBO (NXM business object) for restoring on the server side. The current state of the NBO is taken from the given current NBUF.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the retrieved NBO.

member.name: M:nxm.nbo.core.nbo.components.nbo_document_crud_component.select_nbo``1(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.data.nbo.nbo_list_query_params__)
member.summary: COPILOT: Selects an NBO (NXM business object) based on the specified query parameters.
member.param: The query parameters for selecting the NBO.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the selected NBO.
